_why: Base parameter defaults for the AI-OS model entity in Open WebUI. Profile Selector filter overrides these per-turn. These serve as the fallback when no task class is detected.

discussion._why: Balanced temperature for fluent technical dialogue. Not too creative, not too deterministic. Presence/frequency penalties prevent repetition in long conversations.

coding._why: Low temperature maximises determinism. Code correctness degrades rapidly above 0.3. Reasoning budget ensures multi-step logic is fully worked before output.

architecture._why: Moderate temperature preserves structured reasoning while allowing creative solution exploration. High reasoning budget required — architecture analysis involves 7 mandatory sections.

analysis._why: Balanced between discussion and coding. Analysis requires structured thinking (low temperature) but also synthesis across multiple sources (moderate top_p).

creative._why: High temperature enables generative exploration. Penalty values are zero — repetition is sometimes intentional in creative work.

research._why: High max_tokens and reasoning budget for synthesis tasks. Moderate temperature preserves accuracy while allowing cross-domain connections.

debugging._why: Minimum temperature for maximum determinism. Debugging requires exact trace-following and hypothesis ranking — variance degrades both.
